level_signals: Founding PM role with end-to-end ownership
Comp range $232K–$290K base consistent with Senior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have 6+ years of relevant experience (e.g., product manager, founder, engineer, researcher etc.)
Experience building voice agents, e.g., LLMs, speech-to-text models, text-to-speech models, speech-to-speech models, background noise separation, call center integrations.
Strong technical acumen — comfortable discussing APIs, AI models, and architecture with engineers
Experience building voice conversational AI using latest LLMs and TTS technologies
Proven track record of shipping impactful features in fast-paced environments

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: A Computer Science, Engineering, or Math degree or equivalent technical experience
Experience working at a startup or high-growth company
Experience working on an enterprise B2B product

scope.business_model: enterprise B2B SaaS, conversational AI platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Voice agent performance vs. human-level benchmark
Customer adoption across use cases (support, outreach, onboarding, retention)
core_responsibilities: Define the vision, strategy, and roadmap for Decagon's voice agent
Work closely with customers to deeply understand their problems and requirements
Translate these into clear specs and evals, then partner with engineering and research to bring them to life
Own initiatives end-to-end, from discovery and scoping to launch and adoption

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($232K–$290K base + equity)
Founding PM role with clear ownership of high-visibility surface (voice agent)
Backed by top-tier investors (a16z, Accel, Bain Capital Ventures, Coatue, Index Ventures)
Strong enterprise customer roster (Cash App, Square, Chime, Oura Health)
Clear product mission and use cases articulated in JD
red_flags: Fully in-office requirement with no cities listed — candidates cannot confirm location without external research
Dual requirement for both 'voice agent experience' and 'voice conversational AI using LLMs and TTS' may be redundant or could signal very narrow candidate pool
No team size or reporting structure mentioned for a founding PM role

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and founding PM framing)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and customer list)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
location.cities_listed (JD states in-office but no specific city named)
location.office_time_required (inferred as full in-office from 'We're an in-office company')
ambiguities: No specific office city is mentioned in the JD, making it impossible to confirm which location(s) this role is based in without external research.

The 'voice agent experience' requirement and 'experience building voice conversational AI using latest LLMs and TTS technologies' requirement significantly overlap; unclear if these are distinct bars or two phrasings of the same requirement.
Visa sponsorship and work authorization are not addressed anywhere in the JD.
